# terrible_community_general_copr (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Copr directory name, for example `@copr/copr-dev`.

### Optional

- `chroot` (String) The name of the chroot that you want to enable/disable/remove in the project, for example `epel-7-x86_64`. Default chroot is determined by the operating system, version of the operating system, and architecture on which the module is run.
- `excludepkgs` (String) List of packages to exclude.
- `host` (String) The Copr host to work with.
- `includepkgs` (String) List of packages to include.
- `protocol` (String) This indicate which protocol to use with the host.
- `state` (String) Whether to set this project as `enabled`, `disabled`, or `absent`.

### Read-Only

- `repo` (String) Path to the project on the host.
- `repo_filename` (String) The name of the repo file in which the copr project information is stored.
